  - Removing MCP server via Claude CLI
  - Removing PM skills: {PM_SKILLS_DIR}
  - Removing fleet skills: {FLEET_SKILLS_DIR}

  - Removing workflow runtime: {NODE_MODULES_DIR}
  - Removing workflow schemas: {SCHEMAS_DIR}
  - Removing workflows directory: {WORKFLOWS_DIR}

Uninstall complete.

  If you manually modified these settings, some entries might remain.
  Please review your provider settings files if you suspect residual config.
